From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

The **administrations of Asmara** are the official administrative divisions of [Asmara](/wiki/Asmara "Asmara"), the capital of [Eritrea](/wiki/Eritrea "Eritrea"). Within the city, there are thirteen districts (ንኡስ ዞባ). These districts are administered under North, North-West, North-East, South-East, South-West, East, West and Central areas.

## Districts

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Administrations_of_Asmara&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Districts")]

### North

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Administrations_of_Asmara&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: North")]

* *[Akhrya District](/w/index.php?title=Akhrya_District&action=edit&redlink=1 "Akhrya District (page does not exist)")* (Acria, Mehram Chira, part of Edaga Arbi, Adi Nefas, Durfo)
* *[Abbashaul District](/w/index.php?title=Abbashaul_District&action=edit&redlink=1 "Abbashaul District (page does not exist)")* (Abbashaul, Gheza Berhanu, part of Edaga Arbi, Hadish Adi)
* *[Edaga Hamus District](/w/index.php?title=Edaga_Hamus_(Asmara_district)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Edaga Hamus (Asmara district) (page does not exist)")* (Edaga Hamus, Embagaliano)

### North-East

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Administrations_of_Asmara&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: North-East")]

* *[Arba'ete Asmara District](/w/index.php?title=Arba%27ete_Asmara_District&action=edit&redlink=1 "Arba'ete Asmara District (page does not exist)")* (Arba'ete Asmara, Gheza Kenisha, Gheza Tanika, Medeber, Deposito, Beit Gheorgis)

### North-West

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Administrations_of_Asmara&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: North-West")]

* *[May Temenai District](/w/index.php?title=May_Temenai_District&action=edit&redlink=1 "May Temenai District (page does not exist)")* (May Temenai, Seghen)
* *[Paradiso District](/w/index.php?title=Paradiso_District&action=edit&redlink=1 "Paradiso District (page does not exist)")* (Paradiso, Adi Sogdo, Adi Abeito)

### South-West

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Administrations_of_Asmara&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: South-West")]

* *[Sembel District](/w/index.php?title=Sembel_District&action=edit&redlink=1 "Sembel District (page does not exist)")* (Sembel & Sembel Residential Complex)

### South-East

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Administrations_of_Asmara&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: South-East")]

* *[Godaif District](/w/index.php?title=Godaif_District&action=edit&redlink=1 "Godaif District (page does not exist)")* (Godaif, Bargima, Kahawta)

### Central

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Administrations_of_Asmara&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Central")]

* *[Ma'akel Ketema District](/w/index.php?title=Ma%27akel_Ketema_District&action=edit&redlink=1 "Ma'akel Ketema District (page does not exist)")* (Shuq, Central Zone, Tab'ah)

### Western

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Administrations_of_Asmara&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Western")]

* *[Tiravolo District](/w/index.php?title=Tiravolo_District&action=edit&redlink=1 "Tiravolo District (page does not exist)")* (Tiravolo, Kagnew Station/Denden Camp, Campo Volo)
* *[Gejeret District](/w/index.php?title=Gejeret_District&action=edit&redlink=1 "Gejeret District (page does not exist)")* (large (A'bay) Gejeret, small (Neish'toy) Gejeret)

### Eastern

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Administrations_of_Asmara&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Eastern")]

* *[Gheza Banda District](/w/index.php?title=Gheza_Banda_District&action=edit&redlink=1 "Gheza Banda District (page does not exist)")* (Ziban Sinkey, Gheza Banda, Ferrovia, Mai Chehot)
* *[Tsetserat District](/w/index.php?title=Tsetserat_District&action=edit&redlink=1 "Tsetserat District (page does not exist)")* (Tsetserat, Enda German, Space, Biet Makae, Villaggio, Senita)

## References

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Administrations_of_Asmara&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: References")]

* [Administrations of Asmara](http://www.asmera.nl/asmara-districts.htm)
